topStories.description: TVK leader to contest two urban seats in debut election; precedent set by Jayalalithaa, who once contested four seats; PT, DMK, Congress leaders have also attempted dual contests, with less than stellar results

topStories.title: ‘Extradition? say the word…’ Somaliland’s blistering reply intensifies Ilhan Omar–Vance clash
topStories.description: Speaking in a podcast interview with commentator Benny Johnson, Vance said the administration is examining possible legal avenues. “We think Ilhan Omar definitely committed immigration fraud against the United States of America,” Vance said.

topStories.title: Three arrested in Paris after attempted bomb attack outside Bank of America
topStories.description: France's anti-terrorism prosecutor's office said it had immediately taken over the investigation.

topStories.title: Texas tragedy - Woman visiting cancer-stricken friend killed in ‘carjacking attack,' reveals report
topStories.description: The victim — Marietta Allison had travelled from Austin to be with her friend, Cassie Daniel, who was receiving treatment for stage 4 ovarian cancer

topStories.title: Israeli police block Catholic cardinal from Holy Sepulchre on Palm Sunday
topStories.description: Since the US and Israel launched a war on Iran, Israel has closed holy sites in Jerusalem, citing safety concerns.

topStories.title: Middle East War: Ukraine's Zelenskyy accuses Russia of assisting Iran with satellite images, intel of US air base
topStories.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, on Saturday (local time), accused Russia of assisting Iran in its war against US by sharing satellite images and intel. Zelenskyy, citing daily intelligence update, said that Moscow shared images of some of the facilities that Tehran has targeted

topStories.title: How the US memeifies its war on Iran
topStories.description: Al Jazeera’s Linh Nguyen explains the new era of war propaganda.

dailyNews.title: Enemies of the ‘Ambedkar Constitution’ have to be routed in the polls: Akhilesh
dailyNews.description: In 2024, the SP and Congress pushed the BJP to second place, and on Sunday, Mr. Yadav struck the same tune that helped him stop the BJP

dailyNews.title: New images show destruction of $300 million USAF E-3 Sentry, struck by Iranian missile in Saudi's Prince Sultan Air Base
dailyNews.description: Iran's IRGC reportedly destroyed a US AWACS plane, leading to significant military losses. Ukrainian intelligence suggests Russia may have aided Iran by providing satellite imagery. The US has lost numerous military assets, with costs estimated between $1.4 billion and $2.9 billion.

dailyNews.title: Fast justice for Zubeen Garg among five Congress guarantees for Assam
dailyNews.description: The other guarantees include land rights for 10 lakh indigenous people and unconditional incentives for women and the elderly

dailyNews.title: Dubai, Abu Dhabi at risk if UAE enters Iran war, says top US economist Jeffrey Sachs
dailyNews.description: Sachs highlighted the vulnerability of key cities like Dubai and Abu Dhabi, speaking to ANI, noting they are designed as global tourism and financial hubs rather than military strongholds.

dailyNews.title: Venugopal dismisses bribery allegations against him, calls them BJP-CPI(M) sponsored

dailyNews.title: How the US memeifies its war on Iran
dailyNews.description: Al Jazeera’s Linh Nguyen explains the new era of war propaganda.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan maintains ‘delicate balancing act’ as it hosts Iran talks
dailyNews.description: Foreign ministers meet in Islamabad, seeking to de-escalate the US-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: ‘Nowhere is really safe’: Iranian dissidents grapple with US war in Iran
dailyNews.description: Critics of Iran's government say they fear retribution while in exile, as well as growing anti-immigrant sentiment.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Isaac Newton: ‘If I have seen further it is by standing on the shoulders of giants’
dailyNews.description: Newton’s famous quote is more than a reflection on science—it is a timeless lesson about progress, humility, and the power of building upon the achievements of those who came before us.

dailyNews.title: Iran war could decide who among JD Vance and Marco Rubio could succeed Donald Trump in 2028: Here is how
dailyNews.description: The ongoing US-Israeli war on Iran is the most unpopular conflict in US history, impacting Trump's midterm election prospects. Vice President Vance and Secretary Rubio are potential candidates for succession, with their political fortunes tied to the war's developments and Trump's decisions.

dailyNews.title: Congress releases list of 284 candidates, names Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury from Baharampur
dailyNews.description: Congress has named Pradip Prasad from Bhabanipur, where Mamata successfully contested last time. The list also included former MP Mausam Noor from Malatipur.

dailyNews.title: US DHS shutdown hits record 44 days as Senate deadlock stalls funding, TSA crisis continues
dailyNews.description: Prospects for a swift resolution remain bleak. The Senate is not scheduled to reconvene until April 13, while the House is out until April 14.

dailyNews.title: Iran ‘hits’ US AWACS, air tankers: What else has it targeted in past month?
dailyNews.description: Iran reportedly hits E-3 Sentry flying radars, which track drones, missiles, aircraft from hundreds of kilometres away.

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict: Pakistan hosts quadrilateral summit with Egypt, Saudi, Turkiye's leaders; here's what's on agenda
dailyNews.description: Pakistan on Sunday (local time) is hosting a quadrilateral summit with the foreign ministers of Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and Turkiye. The meeting comes days after Pakistan presented Islamabad as a possible venue for talks between the US and Iran to bring an end to the four-week-long war.

dailyNews.title: Israel looking for 'solutions' to open Christian sites after barring church leader on Palm Sunday due to war
dailyNews.description: Jerusalem's Church of the Holy Sepulchre closed on Palm Sunday under Israeli wartime rules, drawing rebukes from the Catholic Church and Italy.

dailyNews.title: FCC review of sports broadcasting rules draws thousands of comments amid streaming backlash, chairman says
dailyNews.description: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr says thousands of public comments support keeping major sports games free on broadcast TV amid streaming frustration.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods fans make presence felt at PGA Tour event
dailyNews.description: Tiger Woods fans showed up at the Texas Children's Houston Open on Saturday, hours after the golfer was released from jail following a DUI arrest.

dailyNews.title: Heather Graham, 56, reveals ‘torture’ procedures she uses to maintain youthful appearance
dailyNews.description: Actress Heather Graham says her ageless look comes from yoga, 10 to 11 hours of sleep, and a beauty routine that includes Botox and laser treatments.

topStories.title: Iran war could decide who among JD Vance and Marco Rubio could succeed Donald Trump in 2028: Here is how
topStories.description: The ongoing US-Israeli war on Iran is the most unpopular conflict in US history, impacting Trump's midterm election prospects. Vice President Vance and Secretary Rubio are potential candidates for succession, with their political fortunes tied to the war's developments and Trump's decisions.

topStories.title: Sen Mazie Hirono trolled for admitting Trump not 'a king,' and 'never has been'
topStories.description: Sen. Mazie Hirono's No Kings post backfired as Republicans like Chip Roy and Mike Lee mocked her for seemingly undermining the anti-Trump rallies.

topStories.title: Late-night host Jimmy Kimmel shows up to 'No Kings' protest with kids, holds 'Enough Already' sign
topStories.description: Jimmy Kimmel attended a "No Kings" protest on Saturday with his children and father, posting a photo on Instagram and praising the anti-Trump rally's turnout.

topStories.title: 5 Takeaways From the ‘No Kings’ Rallies as the Midterms Heat Up
topStories.description: The war in Iran was a galvanizing force, but plenty of protesters focused on President Trump’s immigration crackdown. Senate candidates in several key races joined the crowds.

topStories.title: ‘No Kings’ Protests Decry Trump and His Agenda
topStories.description: Thousands of organized demonstrations stretched across the country. Minnesota was a focal point of the protests after a tumultuous immigration crackdown.

topStories.title: No Kings Protests Held Across the U.S.: Photos and Videos
topStories.description: It’s the third time that the coalition behind the “No Kings” movement has organized events to protest President Trump and his policies. In the United States, more than 3,000 demonstrations were planned.

topStories.title: ICE May Remain at Airports Even After T.S.A. Pay Resumes, Border Czar Says
topStories.description: Transportation safety officers are set to be paid on Monday, but Tom Homan, the White House’s border czar, said ICE agents may stay where there are shortages.

topStories.title: Transcript: Tom Homan on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," March 29, 2026
topStories.description: The following is the transcript of the interview with Tom Homan, Trump administration border czar, that aired on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" on March 29, 2026.

topStories.title: Transcript: Jerome Adams on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," March 29, 2026
topStories.description: The following is the transcript of the interview with Jerome Adams, surgeon general in the first Trump administration, that aired on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" on March 29, 2026.

topStories.title: Tom Homan says ICE will remain assisting TSA "until the airports feel like they are 100%"
topStories.description: Tom Homan, the Trump administration border czar, told "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" that while President Trump has signed a bill to pay TSA agents, ICE will remain assisting them "until the airports feel like they are 100% … in a place where they can do normal operations."

topStories.title: Sen. Rand Paul on breaking away from Senate Republicans over some of Trump's policies
topStories.description: As chairman of the Homeland Security Committee, Sen. Rand Paul is at the center of some of the country's most critical debates. He speaks with Robert Costa about why he doesn't support President Trump's decision to launch strikes in Iran and how he feels about new Department of Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin.

topStories.title: Trump ban on investor homebuying may come at cost of a bigger real estate deal
topStories.description: President Trump's plan to ban big investors from home ownership may not be the key to reviving the American Dream in affordable housing legislation.

He speaks with Robert Costa about why he doesn't support President Trump's decision to launch strikes in Iran and how he feels about new Department of Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin.

dailyNews.title: Trump ban on investor homebuying may come at cost of a bigger real estate deal
dailyNews.description: President Trump's plan to ban big investors from home ownership may not be the key to reviving the American Dream in affordable housing legislation.

dailyNews.title: Not everyone can expect a bigger tax refund this year — what's actually driving your result
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has said this will be the "largest tax refund season of all time," as a result of his "big beautiful bill." Here's what the megabill means for taxpayers.

dailyNews.title: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
dailyNews.description: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.

dailyNews.title: Trump fans at CPAC hope for the best in Iran but worry over the cost at home
dailyNews.description: The U.S. war with Iran hung over CPAC, the annual conservative conference, where attendees said they trust Trump while hoping the conflict ends soon.

dailyNews.title: Left in limbo, Afghans who served with the U.S. fear Trump could send them back to the Taliban
dailyNews.description: On a former U.S. military base in Qatar, Afghans who supported the United States in its 20-year war against the Taliban have been left in limbo, living in windowless shipping containers far from the new lives they were once promised in the U.S.Now, the Trump administration is presenting them with a stark choice: move to an unspecified third country or return to Taliban-ruled Afghanistan, where they potentially face persecution, imprisonment or death

dailyNews.title: Zelenskyy asked if Trump cares about the future of Ukraine
dailyNews.description: In an interview with NBC News’ Raf Sanchez, President Zelenskyy says that he hopes President Trump cares about the future of Ukraine, but “they care about the United States more.”

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon prepares for weeks of ground operations in Iran
dailyNews.description: If President Trump approves the plans, such an effort would mark a new phase of the war that could be significantly more dangerous to U.S. troops than the first four weeks.

dailyNews.title: MAGA’s eruption has so far kept Trump from endorsing in key Senate race
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump seemed set to endorse Sen. John Cornyn in the Texas Republican primary runoff. But strong opposition from MAGA activists forestalled that.

dailyNews.title: Trump ratchets up attacks on NATO, says U.S. no longer needs alliance
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump suggested the U.S. might move away from its commitment to defend NATO allies, criticizing them for not supporting the war in Iran.
